title: Beshine Black Cable Ties, 100mm x 2.5mm, Pack of 1000, 4" Tie Wraps - Self Locking Small Nylon Zip Ties for Home Office Garage and Workshop
features: VALUE PACK OF 1000 - 1000 Pieces in Black - Length: 100mm, Width: 2.5mm, Thickness: 0.95mm, Tensile Strength: 22 LBS. ( Increase the tensile strength by using two or more together in a row )
ULTRA HEAVY DUTY & DURABLE - Made of industrial strength 6/6 Nylon, Highly climate versatile and will perform well in extreme conditions (14°F to 185°F), Includes UL Flammability of 94V.2.
SELF LOCKING SYSTEM - The fastening mechanism is highly reliable and locks in place very securely, locking teeth stop the cable tie at the desired length.
EASY TO USE - Bent tip ensures easy insertion into the head, smooth edges for a fast and smooth tightening.

APPLIACTION - Our Cable Ties are the perfect choice for your cable management, organizational, or bundling projects. Whether organizing a home office or a project around the house, doing small home renovations or a commercial construction job. Such as organizing electrical wires and PC laptop cords, securing suit case zippers during trips, hanging lights or banners, securing bike accessories, attach fence and much more...
description: Product Description Beshine premium cable ties are the preferred choice of Contractors, Manufacturers, Industrial Facilities, Professionals, Retailers and Businesses. It is also ideal for gardening and DIY jobs around the home. Specifications: Material: Durable and UV-resistant nylon polyamide 6/6 Operating Temp: -40 to 185F / -40°C to +85°C Flammability rating: UL 94 class V2 Dielectric strength: 50,000 volts/mm Self-Locking Fastener Design without Stretching or Slipping Clear Anti-Slip Teeth Strong Self-Locking Fastener Smooth Edges Effortless Insertion Purchase Now Purchase Now Purchase Now Purchase Now Purchase Now Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 7,179 4.6 out of 5 stars 7,179 4.6 out of 5 stars 7,179 4.6 out of 5 stars 7,179 4.6 out of 5 stars 7,179 Price £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £9.49 £ 9 . 49 Length: 100mm / 4inch 200mm / 8inch 300mm / 12inch 300mm / 12inch 300mm / 12inch Width: 2.5mm 3.6mm 3.6mm 4.8mm 7.6mm Thickness: 0.95mm 1.1mm 1.1mm 1.25mm 1.4mm Tensile Strength: 22LBS / 10KG 48LBS / 22KG 48LBS / 22KG 75LBS / 34KG 114LBS / 52KG Color: Black Black/White Black Black/White Black Packing Qty: 500/1000 200/500 150 250 100 Safety Information: Take care and keep away from young children. Be mindful of tensile strength per cable tie when hanging heavy material.
